ValidationFailed.description: A value is out of range or violates a setpoint invariant (e.g. humidity_low_pct < humidity_high_pct); the body names the violated bound. The submission is not recorded as intended state.

ServiceUnavailable.description: The greenhouse exists and the submission validated, but its controller could not be reached to deliver the change. The intended state is recorded and re-asserted once the controller reconnects; retry is not required.

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Occurs only under `SERVICE_AUTH_MODE=oidc`; with the default `SERVICE_AUTH_MODE=trusted_network` the untokened call is accepted and this response does not occur (RFC-011).

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but the token lacks the `setpoints:write` service role (or the operator role) required to submit setpoints. Occurs only under `SERVICE_AUTH_MODE=oidc` (RFC-011, platform security §4).
